goal: Clear all suppliers with risk score under 30 and a US owner.
final_text:
I'll start by loading the triage tool schemas, then query for suppliers matching the criteria.Now let me query for all US-owned suppliers so I can identify those with a risk score under 30.I can see 9 US-owned suppliers with a risk score **strictly under 30** (scores 12–29). S-012 has a score of exactly 30, so it doesn't qualify. I'll now submit clear decisions for all 9 in parallel.All 9 suppliers have been cleared. Here's a summary:
